case_title: KELLS CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS. C.T.B. CONSTRUCTION, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-27-2006 CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
